testcase.name: Login Flow › should login with valid credentials
Login Flow › should show error with invalid credentials
Login Flow › should show validation errors for empty fields
Login Flow › should navigate to register page
Login Flow › should use test login button
Logout Flow › should logout successfully
testcase.error:
[auth-tests] › auth/logout.spec.ts:4:3 › Logout Flow › should logout successfully ────────────────
Test timeout of 30000ms exceeded.
Error: locator.click: Test timeout of 30000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for getByRole('button', { name: /test user/i })
4 | test('should logout successfully', async ({ authenticatedPage }) => { 5 | // Click user menu button > 6 | await authenticatedPage.getByRole('button', { name: /test user/i }).click(); | ^ 7 | 8 | // Click logout button 9 | await authenticatedPage.getByRole('menuitem', { name: /logout/i }).click(); at /Users/erik/dev/mealplanner/frontend/e2e/tests/auth/logout.spec.ts:6:73
attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../../test-results/auth-logout-Logout-Flow-should-logout-successfully-auth-tests/test-failed-1.png ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
attachment #2: video (video/webm) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../../test-results/auth-logout-Logout-Flow-should-logout-successfully-auth-tests/video.webm ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Error Context: ../../test-results/auth-logout-Logout-Flow-should-logout-successfully-auth-tests/error-context.md

testcase.name: Logout Flow › should not access protected routes after logout
testcase.error:

testcase.name: Browse Recipes › should display recipe list
Browse Recipes › should navigate to recipe detail
Browse Recipes › should search recipes
Browse Recipes › should sort recipes
Browse Recipes › should paginate through recipes
Browse Recipes › should navigate to create recipe page
Create Recipe › should create a new recipe with all fields
testcase.error:
[authenticated-tests] › recipes/create.spec.ts:4:3 › Create Recipe › should create a new recipe with all fields
Test timeout of 30000ms exceeded.
Error: locator.fill: Test timeout of 30000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for getByLabel(/title/i)
7 | 8 | // Fill in recipe details > 9 | await authenticatedPage.getByLabel(/title/i).fill('E2E Test Recipe'); | ^ 10 | await authenticatedPage.getByLabel(/description/i).fill('A test recipe created by E2E tests'); 11 | 12 | // Fill in cooking details at /Users/erik/dev/mealplanner/frontend/e2e/tests/recipes/create.spec.ts:9:50
